stemHtml: You are flying to airport A where the weather is good. Airport B is your alternate, but it is far away. While the aircraft is near airport C, you realise that the fuel on board is actually less than the final reserve fuel. When you listen to the ATIS of airport C, you find out that the weather conditions are less than minima. What should you do in this situation?

options.a: Land in airport C since the aircraft is already in an emergency condition.
options.b: Continue to airport A since the weather is stable.
options.c: Continue to airport A as scheduled.
